Main Quest: Report to Caius Cosades: {"quest_giver": "Sellus Gravius", "location": "Census and Excise Office, Seyda Neen", "prerequisites": [], "steps": ["Complete character creation by discussing your duties with Sellus Gravius at the Census and Excise Office.", "Accept the Coded Package and 87 gold from Gravius.", "Travel to Balmora via silt strider (pay Darvame Hleran) or walk following directions from Elone at Arrille's Tradehouse.", "Visit the South Wall Cornerclub in southeastern Balmora (optional but recommended).", "Speak with patrons about Caius Cosades, then locate Bacola Closcius upstairs.", "Obtain directions from Closcius to Cosades' residence in the northeastern section of Balmora.", "Enter Cosades' house and identify him as 'the shirtless man'.", "Deliver the Coded Package to Caius Cosades.", "Answer 'yes' to all his questions regarding the Emperor's orders and Blades membership.", "Accept the rank of Novice in the Blades.", "Request orders; receive 200 gold if your level is 3 or below."], "rewards": ["200 gold (if level 3 or below)", "Novice rank in the Blades"], "next_quest": "Antabolis Informant"}
Main Quest: Antabolis Informant: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Report to Caius Cosades"], "steps": ["Speak with Caius Cosades in Balmora and request orders.", "Travel to the Balmora Fighters Guild and locate Hasphat Antabolis in the training room.", "Discuss the Nerevarine Cult and Sixth House with Antabolis.", "Accept his favor: retrieve a Dwemer puzzle box from Arkngthand ruins.", "Exit Balmora southward and head east toward Moonmoth Legion Fort.", "At the fork near the fort, take the northeast path toward Molag Mar.", "Cross the ancient Dwemer bridge over Foyada Mamaea.", "Locate Arkngthand Dwemer ruin on your right; turn the crank handle and enter.", "Descend to the bottom level where bandits Frink Ruuz and Surus Velvus are stationed.", "Face west toward three doors leading to Weepingbell Hall.", "Climb the rocky ramp above those doors.", "Enter the left door (Cells of Hollow Hand).", "Retrieve the puzzle box from the shelves on your left.", "Defeat Boss Crito if necessary.", "Return to Hasphat Antabolis at the Balmora Fighters Guild.", "Deliver the puzzle box and receive notes for Caius.", "Return to Caius Cosades and deliver the notes."], "rewards": ["Hasphat's notes for Cosades", "Blades faction advancement"], "next_quest": "Gra-Muzgob Informant"}
Main Quest: Gra-Muzgob Informant: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Antabolis Informant"], "steps": ["Speak with Caius Cosades in Balmora to receive orders about obtaining information from Sharn gra-Muzgob.", "Travel to the Balmora Mages Guild and locate Sharn gra-Muzgob.", "Ask Sharn gra-Muzgob about the errand she requires; she will request the Skull of Llevule Andrano.", "Accept supplies from Sharn: an enchanted blade and scrolls (useful against undead immune to normal weapons).", "Travel to Andrano Ancestral Tomb, located south of Pelagiad and northeast of Seyda Neen.", "Enter the tomb and locate the burial chamber containing the skull.", "Retrieve the Skull of Llevule Andrano from the chamber.", "Return to Sharn gra-Muzgob in Balmora and deliver the skull.", "Receive the Nerevarine cult notes from Sharn.", "Return to Caius Cosades and deliver the notes.", "Receive promotion to Blades Apprentice and additional scrolls."], "rewards": ["Nerevarine cult notes", "Promotion to Blades Apprentice", "Additional scrolls"], "next_quest": "Vivec Informants"}
Main Quest: Vivec Informants: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Gra-Muzgob Informant", "Must be level 3 or higher"], "steps": ["Return to Caius Cosades in Balmora after reaching level 3 for new orders.", "Travel to Vivec using Silt Strider or Mages Guild transport.", "Huleeya Task: Locate Huleeya at Black Shalk Cornerclub (Foreign Quarter Lower Waistworks).", "Persuade the troublemakers (Ethys Savil and associates) bothering Huleeya to leave him alone.", "Escort Huleeya to Jobasha's Rare Books (same level, opposite side of cornerclub).", "Receive notes from Huleeya and collect the 'Progress of Truth' book (second floor, left bookcase).", "Addhiranirr Task: Find Addhiranirr hiding in St. Olms Underworks (northeast area).", "Locate Census and Excise agent Duvianus Platorius in St. Olms Waistworks.", "Persuade or lie to Duvianus that Addhiranirr fled to the mainland.", "Return to Addhiranirr and receive her information about Sixth House smuggling.", "Mehra Milo Task: Travel to Library of Vivec (Hall of Wisdom, Temple Canton).", "Meet Mehra Milo and follow her to the library's back section.", "Obtain the book 'Progress of Truth' (steal from library or purchase from Jobasha for 150 gold).", "Return all gathered information and the book to Caius Cosades in Balmora."], "rewards": ["200 gold", "Promotion to Journeyman in Blades", "+1 reputation point"], "next_quest": "Zainsubani Informant"}
Main Quest: Zainsubani Informant: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Vivec Informants"], "steps": ["Return to Caius Cosades in Balmora and accept the assignment to investigate an Ashlander informant.", "Travel to Ald'ruhn (north of Balmora past Caldera; use Silt Strider or Mages Guild teleportation).", "Locate the Ald Skar Inn southwest of the Manor District building.", "Find Hassour Zainsubani on the middle level of the inn.", "Initiate dialogue and select the 'business' topic to discuss gift-giving customs.", "Learn that Hassour enjoys poetry and prefers thoughtful gifts.", "Visit Codus Callonus's bookstore and purchase a poetry book ('Words of the Wind' 45g, 'Ashland Hymns' 35g, or 'The Five Far Stars' 25g).", "Return to Hassour and present the book as a gift.", "Request information about the Ashlanders and Nerevarine Cult.", "Receive Zainsubani's Notes documenting his findings.", "Return to Caius in Balmora with the notes."], "rewards": ["200 gold", "Blades faction promotion", "Zainsubani's Notes", "Decoded package copy"], "next_quest": "Meet Sul-Matuul"}
Main Quest: Meet Sul-Matuul: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Zainsubani Informant"], "steps": ["Return to Caius in Balmora; receive decoded orders revealing the Emperor's plan to use you to fulfill the Nerevarine Prophecies.", "Travel to Moonmoth Legion Fort (optional) to obtain supplies from Somutis Vunnis and Crulius Pontanian.", "Journey to Urshilaku Camp on the northern coast; fastest route uses silt striders via Ald'ruhn to Khuul.", "Locate and speak with Zabamund (Sul-Matuul's champion); raise disposition to approximately 70 or use one of four persuasion methods.", "Enter the Ashkhan's yurt to meet Sul-Matuul after obtaining Zabamund's permission.", "Travel south-southeast to Urshilaku Burial Caverns and navigate through chambers: Astral Burial, Karma Burial, Laterus Burial, Juno Burial.", "Defeat the Wraith of Sul-Senipul and retrieve the Bonebiter Bow.", "Return to Sul-Matuul with the bow; receive 'Clanfriend' status.", "Enter the Wise Woman's Yurt and speak with Nibani Maesa about prophecies; ask about 'passing the test'.", "Report findings to Caius in Balmora."], "rewards": ["Clanfriend status with Urshilaku", "Bonebiter Bow (keep)", "400 gold"], "next_quest": "Sixth House Base"}
Main Quest: Sixth House Base: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Meet Sul-Matuul"], "steps": ["Return to Caius in Balmora after meeting Nibani Maesa for your next assignment.", "Travel to Buckmoth Legion Fort (south of Ald'ruhn) and speak with Raesa Pullia.", "Learn about the Sixth House base location from Raesa's report on the scouting party.", "Journey to Gnaar Mok on the west coast and speak with locals (requiring disposition 50+).", "Discover the caverns are located on Khartag Point, northwest of Gnaar Mok.", "Enter 'Ilunibi, Carcass of the Saint' caverns and navigate through multiple enemy encounters.", "Reach the final section called Soul's Rattle and locate Dagoth Gares.", "Initiate conversation with Dagoth Gares to learn lore before combat.", "Defeat Dagoth Gares (unique Ash Ghoul enemy).", "Loot the bell chamber for valuable items including Fists of Randagulf.", "Return to Caius in Balmora to report quest completion."], "rewards": ["Promotion to Traveller in the Blades", "Corprus disease (contracted upon defeating Dagoth Gares)"], "next_quest": "Corprus Cure"}
Main Quest: Corprus Cure: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Sixth House Base"], "steps": ["Return to Caius Cosades in Balmora after contracting Corprus disease and receive a Dwemer Coherer artifact, 1000 gold, and levitation potions.", "Travel to Tel Fyr on an island in Azura's Coast (use Guild Guide to reach Sadrith Mora, then ask Sondryn Irathi at Wolverine Hall for directions).", "Enter Tel Fyr's Onyx Hall and speak with Beyte Fyr to learn Divayth's location.", "Levitate to Divayth Fyr's study in the Hall of Fyr.", "Give Divayth the Dwemer Coherer and discuss corprus disease with him.", "Accept his offer: retrieve Dwemer Boots of Flying from Yagrum Bagarn in the Corprusarium below.", "Descend to the Corprusarium and avoid or disable hostile Corprus creatures using invisibility, sneak, or knockouts.", "Locate Yagrum Bagarn in Corprusarium Bowels and obtain the boots.", "Optionally find a guarskin drum and return it to Uupse Fyr to safely exit without combat.", "Return to Divayth Fyr with the boots.", "Accept and consume the potion to receive disease immunity while retaining Corprus benefits."], "rewards": ["Corprus cure potion (removes negative effects, preserves disease immunity)", "1000 gold (from Caius)"], "next_quest": "Mehra Milo and the Lost Prophecies"}
Main Quest: Mehra Milo and the Lost Prop: {"quest_giver": "Caius Cosades", "location": "Balmora", "prerequisites": ["Corprus Cure"], "steps": ["Return to Caius Cosades in Balmora after completing the Corprus cure. Accept promotion to Operative and receive his final orders about locating the lost prophecies.", "Travel to Vivec's Hall of Wisdom in the Temple Canton to find Mehra Milo.", "Search the Library of Vivec; discover Milo is no longer there and locate her private quarters opposite the Canon Offices.", "Unlock her quarters (level 20 lock) and find a coded note explaining she is imprisoned at the Ministry of Truth. The note instructs you to obtain two Divine Intervention scrolls.", "Acquire two Divine Intervention scrolls (purchasable from Janand Maulinie at the Mages Guild in Foreign Quarter).", "Travel to the Ministry of Truth (the floating meteor above Temple Canton) using levitation potions or spells, or donate a levitation potion at the Shrine to Stop the Moon.", "Locate guard Alvela Saram at the Ministry's entrance and mention Mehra Milo. Receive the main key and back door access instructions.", "Navigate through the Ministry stealthily or using invisibility. Locate the Prison Keep (level 20 lock) and find the Ministry of Truth Sector Key in the Grand Inquisitor's desk.", "Alternatively, obtain Ordinator armor and bluff your way through using the 'proper authorization' dialogue option if disposition permits.", "Find Mehra Milo in the rightmost prison cell. Give her one Divine Intervention scroll for her escape.", "Use your own Divine Intervention scroll to teleport to Ebonheart.", "Go to Ebonheart's east docks and locate Blatta Hateria. Tell her Mehra sent you and that you want to 'go fishing'.", "Pay Blatta for passage to Holamayan (Azura's Coast Region).", "Upon arrival at Holamayan, speak with Vevrana Aryon about the magical entrance. Rest until dusk (6pm-8pm) or dawn (6am-8am) when the shield opens.", "Enter Holamayan monastery and locate Mehra Milo with Gilvas Barelo in the library.", "Speak with Gilvas Barelo to receive three prophecy documents: 'The Lost Prophecy', 'The Seven Curses', and 'Kagrenac's Tools'.", "Exhaust all dialogue options with Barelo to gather comprehensive lore information.", "Travel to Urshilaku Camp and deliver the lost prophecies to Nibani Maesa."], "rewards": ["Promotion to Operative in Blades", "+60 disposition with Mehra Milo", "Three prophecy documents"], "next_quest": "The Path of the Incarnate"}
Main Quest: The Path of the Incarnate: {"quest_giver": "Nibani Maesa", "location": "Urshilaku Camp", "prerequisites": ["Mehra Milo and the Lost Prophecies"], "steps": ["Return to Urshilaku Camp and speak with Nibani Maesa about the lost prophecies.", "Wait one day (or speak to her again immediately) to receive her judgment.", "Learn about the Seven Trials; discover the first two are already complete.", "Consult with Sul-Matuul regarding the Third Trial.", "Travel to Kogoruhn, an ancient Sixth House stronghold southeast of camp.", "Collect three tokens from Kogoruhn: corprus weepings, a House Dagoth cup, and the Shadow Shield.", "Return tokens to Sul-Matuul to receive Malipu-Ataman's Belt and learn the Third Trial riddle.", "Solve the riddle by consulting Ashlanders: identify Valley of the Wind, Airan's Teeth rock spires, and Azura's Star.", "Navigate to Cavern of the Incarnate at the valley's base.", "Wait for dawn or dusk when Azura's Star appears to unlock the cavern door.", "Enter the cavern and retrieve the Moon-and-Star ring from Azura's statue.", "Optionally speak with ghosts of failed incarnates to receive enchanted items.", "Report back to Nibani Maesa and Sul-Matuul (optional but recommended)."], "rewards": ["Moon-and-Star ring (enchanted)", "+5 reputation"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Redoran Hortator: {"quest_giver": "Athyn Sarethi", "location": "Sarethi Manor, Ald'ruhn (Manor District)", "prerequisites": ["The Path of the Incarnate"], "steps": ["Visit Athyn Sarethi at Sarethi Manor in Ald'ruhn's Manor District to learn about House Redoran council members.", "If not a House member, rescue Varvur Sarethi from Venim Manor's Right Wing.", "Locate the note to Malsa Ules on a bench in the large room containing the hidden chamber key.", "Use the key to open the door behind the tapestry (50-level lock) where Varvur is imprisoned.", "Escort Varvur back to Sarethi Manor, avoiding or defeating guards without killing Bolvyn Venim.", "Obtain Athyn Sarethi's vote and receive the Red Book of 3E 426 listing council members.", "Visit Miner Arobar at Arobar Manor to secure his vote.", "Visit Garisa Llethri at Llethri Manor for his support.", "Visit Hlaren Ramoran at Ramoran Manor for his agreement.", "Visit Brara Morvayn (widow of Remas) at Morvayn Quarters (accessible via Redoran Council Hall).", "Confront Bolvyn Venim; he refuses and offers a duel challenge.", "Travel to Vivec's Arena to duel Bolvyn Venim to the death.", "Return to Athyn Sarethi to receive official Hortator designation and Ring of the Hortator."], "rewards": ["Ring of the Hortator", "Note from the Archcanon", "+4 reputation"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Hlaalu Hortator: {"quest_giver": "Crassius Curio", "location": "Curio Manor, Vivec Hlaalu Plaza", "prerequisites": ["The Path of the Incarnate"], "steps": ["Obtain the Yellow Book of 3E 426 from Nileno Dorvayn (costs 50 gold) to identify all council members.", "Visit Crassius Curio at Curio Manor; secure his vote via kiss (70+ disposition) or payment (500-1000 gold).", "Locate Dram Bero in the Haunted Manor basement (St. Olms, Vivec); pick the locked door and speak with him.", "Find Yngling Half-Troll at Yngling Manor (St. Olms Plaza, Vivec); pay 1000 gold (House members) or 2000 gold (non-members), or kill him.", "Travel to Dren Plantation north of Vivec; deal with Orvas Dren through negotiation, blackmail, or combat.", "Visit Velanda Omani at Omani Manor on Elmas Island (east of St. Olms); obtain her vote.", "Travel to Ules Manor west of Suran; speak with Nevena Ules to secure her vote.", "Return to Crassius Curio to receive the Belt of the Hortator."], "rewards": ["Belt of the Hortator"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Telvanni Hortator: {"quest_giver": "Master Aryon", "location": "Tel Vos, Upper Chamber", "prerequisites": ["The Path of the Incarnate"], "steps": ["Travel to Tel Vos and locate Master Aryon in his upper chamber.", "Speak with Aryon to receive an overview of House Telvanni council members.", "Secure Aryon's vote (automatic upon discussion).", "Travel to Tel Mora and convince Mistress Dratha in the Upper Tower (requires disposition 80+).", "Journey to Sadrith Mora and persuade Master Neloth at Tel Naga (requires disposition 70+).", "Reach Tel Branora and gain support from Mistress Therana in the Upper Tower (requires Speechcraft 30+).", "Visit Gnisis and obtain Master Baladas's vote at Arvs-Drelen (requires disposition 40+).", "Confront Archmagister Gothren at Tel Aruhn's Upper Tower and eliminate him.", "Return to Master Aryon to receive Hortator designation."], "rewards": ["Robe of the Hortator", "+4 reputation"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Urshilaku Nerevarine: {"quest_giver": "Sul-Matuul", "location": "Urshilaku Camp", "prerequisites": ["The Path of the Incarnate"], "steps": ["Travel to Urshilaku Camp and locate Sul-Matuul.", "Initiate conversation with Sul-Matuul regarding the Nerevarine role.", "Select the 'Counsel' dialogue option to learn about Nerevarine duties (optional but recommended).", "Choose the 'Urshilaku Nerevarine' dialogue option to be formally recognized.", "Receive the Teeth of the Urshilaku as proof of status to other Dunmer."], "rewards": ["Teeth of the Urshilaku (enchanted heirloom)", "+10 disposition with Sul-Matuul", "+2 reputation"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Ahemmusa Nerevarine: {"quest_giver": "Sinnammu Mirpal", "location": "Ahemmusa Camp (northeast corner of main island)", "prerequisites": ["The Path of the Incarnate"], "steps": ["Travel to Ahemmusa Camp in the far northeast and speak with any Ashlander about protocol.", "Show courtesy to the three Gulakhans: Kausi (in his yurt), Dutadalk, and Yenammu (in Dutadalk's yurt).", "Speak with Sinnammu Mirpal about becoming Nerevarine.", "Accept her condition: secure Ald Daedroth shrine, located directly north of camp.", "Travel to Ald Daedroth (swimming or water walking recommended).", "Navigate to the Antechamber via the Inner Shrine (straight across the main hall, down stairs).", "Encounter priestess Hlireni Indavel: either persuade her (disposition 90+), threaten her, or leave her be.", "Return to Sinnammu Mirpal at camp.", "Escort Sinnammu to Ald Daedroth's Inner Shrine statue.", "Speak with Sinnammu to receive formal Nerevarine recognition."], "rewards": ["Madstone of the Ahemmusa (enchanted heirloom)", "+10 disposition with Sinnammu Mirpal", "+2 reputation"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Zainab Nerevarine: {"quest_giver": "Kaushad", "location": "Zainab Camp, Grazelands", "prerequisites": ["The Path of the Incarnate"], "steps": ["Travel to Zainab Camp (southwest of Vos, southeast of Cavern of the Incarnate).", "Visit the Wise Woman's Yurt and speak with Sonummu Zabamat to present proofs of the Nerevarine Prophecies.", "Talk to Ashkhan Kaushad; raise his disposition to approximately 70 or gift him exquisite shoes.", "Ask Kaushad to set a task; he assigns you to eliminate vampire Calvario.", "Navigate to Nerano Ancestral Tomb (north and slightly west of camp).", "Defeat Calvario and other undead in the tomb.", "Return to Kaushad; he reveals the next requirement: securing a high-born Telvanni bride.", "Consult Sonummu Zabamat about obtaining a bride.", "Travel to Tel Aruhn and locate Savile Imayn at the slave market entrance.", "Obtain exquisite shirt, skirt, and shoes from Elegnan in Tel Mora.", "Acquire Telvanni Bug Musk from an apothecary.", "Purchase slave Falura Llervu from Savile for approximately 1200 gold.", "Provide Falura with the clothing and musk; instruct her to follow you.", "Escort Falura back to Zainab Camp (boat to Vos recommended to avoid losing her).", "Present Falura to Kaushad in his yurt.", "Speak with Falura to confirm her acceptance.", "Complete dialogue with Kaushad to receive the Nerevarine title."], "rewards": ["Thong of Zainab (enchanted heirloom)", "Ashkhan's Wedding Gift (exquisite shirt)", "+20 disposition with Kaushad"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Erabenimsun Nerevarine: {"quest_giver": "Manirai", "location": "Wise Woman's Yurt, Erabenimsun Camp", "prerequisites": ["The Path of the Incarnate"], "steps": ["Travel to Erabenimsun Camp (southwest of Tel Fyr, south of Tel Aruhn).", "Speak with Manirai about Nerevarine prophecies in the Wise Woman's Yurt.", "Eliminate Ashkhan Ulath-Pal and three supporters: Ahaz, Ranabi, and Ashu-Ahhe.", "Return to Manirai after eliminating opposition.", "Locate Gulakhan Han-Ammu and discuss his reluctance to become Ashkhan.", "Collect three magical items: War Axe of Airan Ammu, Sanit-Kil's Heart of Fire, and Robe of Erur-Dan the Wise.", "Present the items to Han-Ammu and persuade him to accept leadership.", "Ask Han-Ammu to officially name you Nerevarine.", "Return to Manirai and request 'The Seizing of the Erabenimsun'."], "rewards": ["The Seizing of the Erabenimsun (enchanted heirloom token)"], "next_quest": "Hortator and Nerevarine"}
Main Quest: Hortator and Nerevarine: {"quest_giver": "Archcanon Tholer Saryoni", "location": "High Fane, Temple Canton, Vivec", "prerequisites": ["Redoran Hortator", "Hlaalu Hortator", "Telvanni Hortator", "Urshilaku Nerevarine", "Ahemmusa Nerevarine", "Zainab Nerevarine", "Erabenimsun Nerevarine"], "steps": ["Travel to the Temple Canton in Vivec after becoming both Hortator of all three Great Houses and Nerevarine of all four Ashlander tribes.", "Locate and speak with Danso Indules near the High Fane entrance.", "Arrange a meeting with Archcanon Saryoni through Danso.", "Navigate to the Hall of Wisdom and locate the locked back door (requires lockpick or Open spell at difficulty 50).", "Enter Archcanon Saryoni's office via the back entrance.", "Discuss 'Temple's doctrine' with Saryoni to arrange a meeting with Vivec.", "Accept the two keys provided: one for the Archcanon's office, one for Palace of Vivec.", "Proceed south to the Palace of Vivec at the top of the puzzle canal.", "Speak with the god Vivec inside the palace entrance.", "Accept Wraithguard and swear the oath to defeat Dagoth Ur.", "Receive the detailed five-step plan for defeating Dagoth Ur."], "rewards": ["Wraithguard (essential right gauntlet for final confrontation)", "Plan to Defeat Dagoth Ur (detailed instructions)"], "next_quest": "The Citadels of the Sixth House"}
Main Quest: The Citadels of the Sixth Ho: {"quest_giver": "Vivec", "location": "Palace of Vivec, Vivec", "prerequisites": ["Hortator and Nerevarine"], "steps": ["Visit Ghostgate (east of Caldera/Ald'ruhn) and speak with a Buoyant Armiger to obtain a Map of Red Mountain.", "Scout the Red Mountain region inside the Ghostfence to familiarize yourself with locations.", "Optional: Assault seven Ash Vampire citadels to collect magical artifacts from each Ash Vampire.", "Enter Citadel Vemynal and defeat Dagoth Vemyn to retrieve the Sunder artifact.", "Enter Citadel Odrosal and defeat Dagoth Odros; obtain the Keening artifact from the Tower area.", "Proceed to Dagoth Ur's Citadel in Red Mountain's crater.", "Enter Akulakhan's Chamber (note: you cannot exit until the Heart is destroyed).", "Defeat Dagoth Ur's first incarnation.", "Equip Wraithguard, then strike the Heart of Lorkhan once with Sunder and five times with Keening.", "Escape as Akulakhan collapses.", "Meet Azura in the cavern to complete the main quest."], "rewards": ["Sunder", "Keening", "Belt of Heartfire", "Amulets of Heartfire, Heartthrum, Heartrime, Heartheal", "Soul Ring", "Blood Ring", "Heart Ring", "Ring of Azura"], "next_quest": null}
